items.title: DeepSeek 首次融资，AGI 理想向资本低头？
items.summary: DeepSeek的转折，从来不是梁文锋一个人的“理想妥协”，而是整个国产AI行业的缩影。在AI这场残酷的长期竞赛中，技术理想主义需要商业现实的支撑，独立自主需要开放合作的补充，前沿探索需要生态建设的协同。

items.title_en: DeepSeek raises funds for the first time, does AGI’s ideals bow to capital?
items.summary_en: DeepSeek's turning point has never been Liang Wenfeng's "ideal compromise", but a microcosm of the entire domestic AI industry. In the cruel long-term competition of AI, technological idealism needs the support of commercial reality, independence needs to be supplemented by open cooperation, and cutting-edge exploration needs the coordination of ecological construction.

items.title_en: The first year of computing power inflation: The cheaper DeepSeek is, the harder it is to stop this round of price increases
items.summary_en: The cost of AI inference has dropped by more than 80% in 18 months, but China's three major cloud vendors announced price increases in the same week. This will be a structural price game that will last at least two to three years. This article attempts to answer a more important question: When will it end?

items.summary_en: 36Kr learned that the offline interest activity community "Roumen" has completed a new round of financing. The investor is a Hong Kong family fund that has long been focusing on the consumption and lifestyle fields. This round of funds will be mainly used to expand brand influence, improve the supply of high-quality hosts, and accelerate the construction of community ecology and gameplay system. This is also another financing for Rumen after receiving strategic investment from Keep in 2023. Rumen is trying to reconstruct something that is gradually being ignored - how people "play together in the real world." items.title: Meta计划于5月20日启动今年首轮大规模裁员
items.summary: 消息人士称，Meta将在5月20日开始的首轮裁员中裁撤全球约10%的员工，相当于近8000人。这家拥有Facebook与Instagram的科技巨头还计划在今年下半年实施进一步裁员，不过包括具体时间与规模的相关细节，目前尚未最终确定。消息人士补充称，管理层或将根据人工智能技术进展情况调整相关计划。（第一财经）
items.title_zh: Meta计划于5月20日启动今年首轮大规模裁员

items.title_en: Meta plans to launch the first round of large-scale layoffs this year on May 20
items.summary_en: Sources said that Meta will lay off about 10% of its global employees in the first round of layoffs starting on May 20, equivalent to nearly 8,000 people. The technology giant, which owns Facebook and Instagram, also plans to implement further layoffs in the second half of this year, but details including the specific timing and scale have not yet been finalized. The source added that management may adjust relevant plans based on the progress of artificial intelligence technology. (China Business News)

items.title_en: Lenovo Kaitian officially releases a new generation of AI smart phone "Tianxi AI Pro"
items.summary_en: 36Kr learned that Lenovo Kaitian officially released a new generation of AI intelligent body "Tianxi AI Pro". With the official release of Tianxi AI Pro, Lenovo Kaitian announced that its entire line of PC products will be upgraded to Xinchuang AI PC from now on. This full-series upgrade horizontally covers all-scenario terminals such as AI laptops, AI desktops, and AI workstations, and vertically covers the two levels of AI intelligence, L1 (intelligent response level) and L3 (intelligent assistant level).

items.title_en: NVIDIA Jensen Huang: AI is not a nuclear weapon and will not take away all jobs
items.summary_en: IT House reported on April 17 that while appearing on the Dwarkesh Patel podcast, Nvidia CEO Jen-Hsun Huang refuted the AI ​​threat theory and sharply criticized the excessive hype of the AI ​​industry. He believed that AI is not a "nuclear bomb" and will not replace all software engineering jobs. Huang Jen-Hsun clearly opposes comparing AI to nuclear weapons, believing that such scare propaganda will only make the public hostile and fearful of AI, and ultimately harm the United States’ technological competitiveness. Citing the content of the video, IT House emphasized that if society stops cultivating people because of fear that AI will replace humans...

items.title: 台积电CEO：全力扩产仍难以满足强劲AI需求
items.summary: 本周四下午，台积电高管在法说会上宣布，预计2026年公司资本支出将接近520亿至560亿美元的区间顶端水平。当被问及支撑这一资本支出的信心来源时，台积电董事长兼CEO魏哲家回答：“答案很简单：需求极为强劲，尤其是高性能计算与人工智能应用。我们全力加速、提前采购设备，但供应依旧紧张，需求持续增长。这就是资本支出指向区间上限的原因。”（财联社）

items.title_en: TSMC CEO: Fully expanding production is still unable to meet strong AI demand
items.summary_en: On Thursday afternoon, TSMC executives announced at a conference that the company’s capital expenditures in 2026 are expected to be close to the top of the range of US$52 billion to US$56 billion. When asked about the source of confidence to support this capital expenditure, TSMC Chairman and CEO Wei Zhejia replied: "The answer is simple: demand is extremely strong, especially for high-performance computing and artificial intelligence applications. We are fully accelerating and purchasing equipment in advance, but supply is still tight and demand continues to grow. This is why capital expenditures point to the upper limit of the range." (Financial Associated Press)

items.summary_en: 36Kr learned that Hangzhou Second Life Technology Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as "Second Life"), a trendy technology company, recently announced the completion of tens of millions of equity financing, exclusively invested by individual investor Yu Zhengxuan. This round of funding will focus on the iterative research and development of full-color 3D printers and the construction of large world models.

items.title: 力源信息：第一季度净利润同比增长241%
items.summary: 4月19日，力源信息公告称，2026年第一季度实现营业收入28.35亿元，同比增长52.01%；归属于上市公司股东的净利润为1.37亿元，同比增长240.58%。报告期内，公司所在半导体行业在AI技术发展的带动下景气度持续提升，存储芯片需求旺盛价格大幅上涨，MLCC等高端被动元件供应紧张，带动其他半导体产品也出现涨价情况。

items.title_en: Liyuan Information: First quarter net profit increased by 241% year-on-year
items.summary_en: On April 19, Liyuan Information announced that in the first quarter of 2026, it achieved operating income of 2.835 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 52.01%; the net profit attributable to shareholders of listed companies was 137 million yuan, a year-on-year increase of 240.58%. During the reporting period, the semiconductor industry in which the company operates continued to enjoy a boom driven by the development of AI technology. The demand for memory chips was strong and prices rose sharply. The supply of high-end passive components such as MLCCs was tight, which led to price increases for other semiconductor products.

items.title_en: FF: Received US$45 million in new financing
items.summary_en: On April 18, Faraday Future ("FF") announced on its official Weibo that the company had received $45 million in new financing from an institutional investor in the United States. This is the lowest-cost financing transaction the company has reached in recent years. As of April 12, FF has shipped a total of 34 robots, and the cumulative shipment target in 2026 is over 1,000 units. In addition, FF plans to hold its annual shareholders' meeting on May 22 to review a series of proposals aimed at supporting the company's global EAI strategy execution and long-term growth. (Interface News)

items.summary_en: A CITIC Securities research report pointed out that the current AI computing cluster has moved from "stacking computing power" to "strengthening network efficiency", and high-performance, high-bandwidth, and low-latency networks have become the key to improving data center performance. The laser chip is the core component of the optical module and determines the electro-optical conversion efficiency and product generation of the optical module. CITIC Securities believes that the laser chip industry will benefit from the expansion of Scale-out/Scale-up network super nodes and the increase in value brought by technology generations, and will usher in huge development opportunities. items.summary_en: 36Kr learned that the embodied intelligence company “Accelerated Evolution” recently completed nearly 1 billion yuan in financing. This round of financing was jointly led by Beijing Advanced Industrial Fund, Jingguosheng Fund and Huakong Fund. Legend Star, Guohai Innovation Capital, and Bank of Communications Capital participated in the investment. Old shareholders such as Shenzhen Venture Capital, Source Code Capital, Inno Fund, and IDG continued to increase their investment. This round of financing will be used for global delivery network construction, embodied model algorithm development, and iterative upgrade of robot products.

items.title_en: Find 100 answers that were selected by capital｜2026 “Most Watched” Enterprise List Selection Starts
items.summary_en: Produced by 36Kr Venture Capital Research Institute Texted by Luo Jing and Du Meng When capital loses its impetuosity and returns to rationality, when concepts give way to implementation and practical results become the hard currency of the industry, when AI deeply restructures the industrial landscape and hard technology builds a solid foundation for industry development, the primary market in 2026 has entered a new era of venture capital dominated by real value.
